nasb.text: Their territory was from Mahanaim, all Bashan, all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which are in Bashan, sixty cities;

esv.text: Their region extended from Mahanaim, through all Bashan, the whole kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which are in Bashan, sixty cities,

cnv.text: 他們的境界是從瑪哈念起，包括巴珊全地、巴珊王噩的全國，並且在巴珊的睚珥的所有村落，共六十座城，

ccb.text: 从玛哈念开始，包括整个巴珊，就是巴珊王噩的国土及其境内雅珥的六十座城邑，
